matches.reasoning: Golden: negative slicing. Candidate 2: negative offset causes Django AssertionError. Same bug.
Golden: member is None for API key auth. Candidate 0: organization_context.member null check. Same bug.
Golden: math.floor/ceil on datetime. Candidate 1: math.floor/ceil on datetime object. Same bug.
Golden: negative slicing. Candidate 4: negative offset causes AssertionError on QuerySet. Same bug.
Golden: member is None. Candidate 2: organization_context.member accessed without None check. Same bug.
Golden: math.floor/ceil on datetime. Candidate 5: math.floor/ceil TypeError on datetime. Same bug.
Golden: sample_rate=0.0 is falsy. No candidate mentions this specific falsiness issue.
Golden: hash() non-deterministic. Candidate 6: hash() randomization makes cache inconsistent. Same bug.
Golden: outer dataset vs scoped_dataset. Candidate 2: uses dataset from outer scope instead of scoped_dataset. Same bug.
Golden: null ref if github_authenticated_user missing. No candidate describes this exact state being absent.
Golden: pipeline.signature is static. Candidate 0: predictable pipeline.signature. Same bug.
Golden: metadata[sender][login] KeyError. No candidate mentions sender key missing in metadata dict.
Golden: race condition in count check. Candidates mention cache bypass and DoS but none explicitly describe TOCTOU race on concurrent count check.
Golden: auth fails when limit reached. Candidate 2: anonymous auth fails when limit reached, DoS. Same bug.
Golden: dbSession.Exec won't compile. No candidate mentions the Exec signature type mismatch.
Golden: ErrDeviceLimitReached misleading when no rows updated. No candidate matches.
Golden: time window inconsistency. No candidate matches.
Golden: asymmetric cache trust - grants trusted, denials re-checked. Candidate 4: Check does redundant DB query when cache denial present. Same asymmetry.
Golden: test comment says allow but map stores false. No candidate describes this test inconsistency.
Golden: ContextualLoggerMiddleware panics on nil request. No candidate mentions nil request panic.
Golden: traceID no longer logged. Candidate 1: middleware uses static logger instead of FromContext, missing contextual attributes. Close semantic match — loss of traceID is a consequence.
Golden: applyTemplateVariables called with unused param. Candidates mention duplicate filters and injection but not the specific unused parameter.
Golden: downsize defined twice, second overrides first. Candidate 4: redefining downsize breaks callers with ArgumentError. Same bug.
Golden: hardcoded 10MB ignores SiteSettings. Candidate 5: hardcoded limit bypasses SiteSettings. Same bug.
Golden: 80% fails for animated GIFs with gifsicle. Candidate 1: gifsicle expects WxH not percentage. Same bug.
Golden: nil pointer if no TopicUser. Candidate 4: null pointer dereference when TopicUser returns nil. Same bug.
Golden: typo stopNotificiationsText. No candidate mentions this typo.
Golden: should_block has side effects (updates stats). Candidate 5: BlockedEmail.should_block? does DB update in validation. Same bug.
Golden: regex matches suffixes not full domains. Candidate 3: unanchored regex allows whitelist bypasses. Same bug.
Golden: SSRF via open(url). Candidate 7: SSRF via open(url) without validation. Same bug.
Golden: indexOf origin bypass. Candidate 11: loose origin validation using indexOf. Same bug.
Golden: postMessage targetOrigin wrong (full URL not origin). No candidate specifically mentions this.
Golden: X-Frame-Options ALLOWALL. No candidate mentions this.
Golden: NoMethodError if contents nil + XSS via unescaped url. Candidate 5: XSS via unescaped url in TopicEmbed.import. Same XSS bug.
Golden: ERB end if syntax error. Candidate 0: end if syntax error in ERB. Same bug.
Golden: add try-catch around await for import failures. No candidate specifically suggests this.
Golden: forEach with async not awaited. Candidate 2: forEach async not caught, use for-of. Same bug.
Golden: inconsistent naming TwoFactor vs BackupCode.tsx. No candidate mentions naming.
Golden: error says 'backup code login' on disable endpoint. No candidate mentions this.
Golden: case-sensitive indexOf for backup codes. No candidate mentions case sensitivity.
Golden: concurrent login can reuse backup code. Candidate 2: concurrent requests, codes not marked used. Same bug.
Golden: null ref if destinationCalendar null/empty. Candidate 6: null pointer when destinationCalendar null/empty. Same bug.
Golden: redundant optional chaining. No candidate mentions this.
Golden: externalCalendarId self-referential search. Candidate 7: broken fallback with self-referential check. Same bug.
Golden: inverted billing logic. Candidate 8: inverted IS_TEAM_BILLING_ENABLED logic. Same bug.
Golden: Calendar interface createEvent signature break. Candidate 0: createEvent signature causes type errors in implementations. Same bug.
Golden: unreachable branches in getBaseConditions. Candidate 1: remove unreachable branches, authConditions always truthy. Same bug.
Golden: userIdsFromOrg guard excludes org-only members. Candidate 0: use teamIds instead of teamsFromOrg to include org members. Same bug.
Golden: ConditionalPasskeysEnabled called without UserModel param. No candidate mentions this specific API misuse.
Golden: fillContextForm not called when user is null. Candidate 0: authenticate fails to call fillContextForm. Same bug.
Golden: recursive caching using session instead of delegate. 0 candidates — nothing posted.
Golden: cleanup alias reference wrong. 0 candidates — nothing posted.
Golden: returns wrong provider (default instead of BouncyCastle). Candidate 3: getBouncyCastleProvider returns default JVM provider. Same bug.
Golden: dead code — ASN1Encoder written but discarded. Candidate 6: dead ASN1Encoder code immediately discarded. Same bug.
Golden: picocli.exit() calls System.exit(). 0 candidates — nothing posted.
